examples: Instead, "sintering" or "firing" is the process typically used.
His team at Loughborough University has invented a high-speed sintering system.
Hot pressed sintering can shorten sintering time and be beneficial to attain nano grain size sintering materials.
The technology, called laser sintering, is being employed by Cookson Precious Metals to produce jewellery from computer designs.
Additive manufacturing can also be achieved by a number of other methods, such as selective laser sintering (SLS).
